betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Breakfast Meals§f

§aStart your day with hearty breakfast combos.§f

Breakfast foods restore §e3-15 hunger§f and are crafted using the §bSkillet§f and §bCutting Board§f.

§6Examples§f: Fried Egg (3), Scrambled Egg (3), Omelet (4), Bacon and Eggs (4), Biscuits and Gravy (8), French Toast (8), Pancakes (4), Blueberry Pancakes (7), Cinnamon Toast (7), Hearty Breakfast (15 — Cooked Pork + Fried Egg + Toast + Potato Cakes + Chocolate Milk).

§eTip:§f Hearty Breakfast is one of the best early-to-mid game foods at 15 hunger per serving.

§6Breakfast Recipes§f:
§b• Fried Egg§f: Egg in Skillet → §e3 hunger§f
§b• Scrambled Egg§f: Egg + Milk in Skillet → §e3 hunger§f
§b• Omelet§f: 2× Egg + Cheese in Skillet → §e4 hunger§f
§b• Bacon and Eggs§f: Pork + Egg in Skillet → §e4 hunger§f
§b• French Toast§f: Bread + Egg + Milk in Skillet → §e8 hunger§f
§b• Pancakes§f: Flour + Egg + Milk in Skillet → §e4 hunger§f
§b• Hearty Breakfast§f: Cooked Pork + Fried Egg + Toast + Potato Cakes + Chocolate Milk in Cutting Board → §e15 hunger§f

§eTip§f: Craft a §bSkillet§f early — breakfast foods are quick to make and provide solid hunger restoration for exploration.
